title: Create a SpiderIQ Tenant Page
summary: Create a new published page on a SpiderIQ tenant via the @spideriq/mcp-publish MCP server. Walks through reading the help reference, building the blocks[] payload (canonical block schema, no silent-accept anti-patterns), running dry_run preview → confirm, publishing, theming, and deploying. Use for any 'create a page', 'add a page', 'new landing page' request.
